##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless to pale brownish tabular or platy crystals in rosette-like aggregates, associated with ussingite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by chemical analysis
